examples.title: Basic payload inspector
examples.description: Inspect a structured object payload with summary metadata, interactive tree, and raw JSON views.
examples.code:
<script lang="ts">
  import { PayloadInspector } from '@lostgradient/cinder/payload-inspector';

  const payload = {
    userId: 'u_8f2a3b',
    action: 'checkout',
    cart: {
      items: [
        { id: 'p_001', name: 'Widget', qty: 2, price: 19.99 },
        { id: 'p_002', name: 'Gadget', qty: 1, price: 49.95 },
      ],
      total: 89.93,
    },
    timestamp: '2026-06-11T14:22:00Z',
    flags: { guestCheckout: false, promoApplied: true },
  };
</script>

<PayloadInspector
  value={payload}
  meta={{
    contentType: 'application/json',
    source: 'checkout-workflow',
    timestamp: '2026-06-11T14:22:00Z',
  }}
/>

examples.title: Edge cases
examples.description: Demonstrates null, invalid JSON, and empty payload states in the inspector.
examples.code: {#each Object.keys(scenarios) as key (key)} {/each}

examples.title: Signal payload
examples.description: Inspect a workflow signal payload — a common pattern in activity result dashboards.
examples.code:
<script lang="ts">
  import { PayloadInspector } from '@lostgradient/cinder/payload-inspector';

  const signalPayload = {
    signalName: 'PaymentConfirmed',
    data: {
      transactionId: 'txn_5e8b2a',
      amount: 89.93,
      currency: 'USD',
      provider: 'stripe',
      confirmedAt: '2026-06-11T14:23:01Z',
      metadata: {
        statementDescriptor: 'ACME STORE',
        riskScore: 0.12,
      },
    },
    sentAt: '2026-06-11T14:23:01.543Z',
    correlationId: 'ord_9c4e1f',
  };
</script>

<PayloadInspector
  value={signalPayload}
  meta={{
    contentType: 'application/json',
    source: 'payment-service',
    timestamp: '2026-06-11T14:23:01Z',
  }}
/>

examples.title: Workflow input
examples.description: Inspecting a workflow launch payload with signal input, retry policy, and schedule metadata.
examples.code:
<script lang="ts">
  import { PayloadInspector } from '@lostgradient/cinder/payload-inspector';

  const workflowInput = {
    workflowType: 'OrderFulfillment',
    input: {
      orderId: 'ord_9c4e1f',
      customerId: 'cust_221a',
      priority: 'express',
      items: ['sku-100', 'sku-201', 'sku-303'],
      shipTo: {
        name: 'Alex Rivera',
        address: '42 Elm St',
        city: 'Springfield',
        zip: '12345',
      },
    },
    retryPolicy: {
      maximumAttempts: 3,
      initialInterval: '1s',
      maximumInterval: '30s',
      backoffCoefficient: 2,
    },
    searchAttributes: {
      OrderStatus: 'pending',
      CustomerId: 'cust_221a',
    },
  };
</script>

<PayloadInspector
  value={workflowInput}
  meta={{
    contentType: 'application/json',
    source: 'order-service',
    timestamp: '2026-06-11T09:15:42Z',
  }}
/>
